characters.name: 6-Year-Old Matt
characters.description: 6-Year-Old MattBiographyFull NameMatt McNamara(child portrayal)StatusAliveGenderMaleResidenceMiami, Florida, United StatesAppearancesSeasons2Episodes1Appearance"Joel Gideon"Portrayed byDavid Weiss6-Year-Old Mattis a special character in thesecondseason of theFXmedical dramaNip/Tuck. He is the child portrayal of Matt McNamara. He is portrayed byDavid Weiss. AsMatt McNamaraandSean McNamaraare heading up to take diving lessons for the first time, they are about to go and Sean sees child presence of Matt as a child. This episode in particular explored the theme of escaping death, the car crash Sean was involved with, it got him thinking about that aspect of the life. Sean wanted to eat something they never ate with the family before, like deciding to order fugu in the restaurant. Later on, he thinks diving would be next thing to do with his son. His final decision was not to participate in diving and tells Matt about it.

characters.name: Adrian Moore
characters.description: Adrian MooreBiographyFull NameAdrian MooreDeathSuicide by self-stabbingStatusDeceasedGenderMaleRelativesAva Moore(adoptive mother)Barrett Moore(father)Unnamed biological motherRomancesAva Moore(incestuous relationship)ResidenceMiami, Florida, United StatesAppearancesSeasons2Episodes5First"Bobbi Broderick"Last"Joan Rivers"Portrayed bySeth GabelAdrian Mooreis a recurring character in thesecond seasonof theFXmedical dramaNip/Tuck. He is the sociopathic son ofAva Moore. He is portrayed bySeth Gabel. Adrian is the son ofAva MooreandDr. Barrett Moore. He was living in Miami with his mother. The two of them were having a sexual relationship and he became obsessed with his mom. He also developed a sociopathic personality. When Ava starts a relationship with Matt and neglects Adrian, he does not take it well. He acts out and does all he can to get his mother back. He even begs her to make love to him.

characters.name: Alejandro Pérez
characters.description: Alejandro PerezBiographyFull NameAlejandro PerezDeathMurdered(byEscobar-S4)StatusDeceasedGenderMaleRelativesSilvio Pérez(brother)Unnamed daughterRomancesUnnamed girlfriendAppearancesSeasons1,4Episodes2First"Pilot"Last"Merrill Bobolit"Portrayed byRaymond CruzAlejandro Perezis a recurring character in theFXmedical dramaNip/Tuck. He was the brother ofSilvio Pérez. Silvio was a child molester who had his face changed so he could run away from the druglord,Escobar Gallardo. He is portrayed byRaymond Cruz. During a second surgery, Alejandro killed his brother. Alejandro's girlfriend is pregnant and they are having a daughter. Alejandro killed Silvio because he could not risk the safety of his daughter in the future. He knew his brother was sick and as he said, Silvio had shamed their family for the last time. He left the operating room with Escobar Gallardo and it is assumed that he was still working for him.

characters.name: Annie McNamara
characters.description: Annie McNamara1x014x056x03BiographyFull NameAnn Katherine McNamaraAliasesBaby(bySean)Kiddo(byMatt)Sweety(byEscobar-S1)Pumpkin(byEscobar-S1)Princess Menses(bySuzanne-S2)Squirt(byMatt-S4)StatusAliveGenderFemaleRelativesUnnamed grandfatherErica Noughton(grandmother)Tom McNamara(grandfather)Kathleen McNamara(grandmother)Sean McNamara(father)Julia McNamara(mother)Conor McNamara(brother)Matt McNamara(half-brother)Brendan McNamara(uncle)Jenna McNamara(niece)Raphael McNamara(adoptive half-brother)FriendsRosaSuzanne EpsteinZoey(S4)ResidenceMiami, Florida, United StatesLos Angeles, California, United StatesAppearancesSeasons1,2,3,4,5,6Episodes36First"Pilot"Last"Hiro Yoshimura"Portrayed byKelsey BatelaanAnn Katherine McNamarais a recurring character fromfirstseason tosixthin theFXmedical dramaNip/Tuck. She is the daughter of Sean and Julia McNamara. Annie first appears on the show in the Pilot episode. Here she is shown as going back to school, allowing her mother Julia to go back to medical school. She also adopts the class pet gerbil, Frisky. Julia later kills the pet, and does not tell Annie. Instead she bought her a new one. Annie, at the age of 8, starts puberty. Annie's friend's mother throws Annie a "Princess Menses" party and invites her friends to celebrate the passage to womanhood.
